info.title: Viewpoint API v1
info.description: The Viewpoint API provides access to data from the Viewpoint Construction ERPs (Enterprise Resource Planning) software, Vista and Spectrum. Trimble's API's are built to link our construction ERPs with other systems used in the construction industry. The fundamental focus for a construction company is to manage the work and costs necessary to complete a job, which might be referred to as a project. For access to the Trimble Viewpoint APIs, email integration-jumpstart-ug@trimble.com with the enterprise that you would like to use and the Trimble ID associated with your application. The endpoints are sorted alphabetically. The default output page contains 20 records. Data that can be pulled from the ERPs includes but is not limited to company, contract, employee, equipment, project cost, vendor

post.description: Creates a new ClientAccount. For tenantRelationship there are two options: Using the SELECTIVE tenantRelationship means that a tenant gets asoociated with a client account or multiple client accounts. Using the INCLUSIVE tenantRelationship means that a tenant has access to all client accounts. It acts like a wildcard.

put.description: Modify a ClientAccount. The 4 options for modifying a clientAccount's segment are 'add', 'update', 'remove', 'none'. 'none' just lists the existing segment and does not change anything.
